metaDescription.en: Custom websites and applications built for performance.

summary.en: How we replatformed Acme's 50k-SKU storefront on Next.js + headless commerce, cutting page weight in half and tripling mobile conversion.

challenge.en: Legacy Magento storefront with 4-second LCP, brittle inventory sync, and a checkout abandonment rate above industry average.

solution.en: Replatformed onto Next.js App Router with headless commerce, edge-cached PDPs, and a new design system. Inventory sync moved to event-driven streaming.

result.en: LCP under 1.2s on mobile, 3× mobile conversion lift, and a 28% reduction in checkout abandonment in the first quarter post-launch.

metaTitle.en: Acme Storefront Rebuild — Case Study | KalpBloom

metaDescription.en: How we tripled mobile conversion for Acme by replatforming on Next.js.

quote.en: KalpBloom transformed our storefront. The new site is faster, easier to manage, and our team can ship campaigns without engineering help.
Seamless, intuitive, feature-rich — their expertise in mobile development is unmatched.

question.en: Where is your company based, and who do you serve?

answer.en: We are based in India and provide digital services to clients globally, with delivery aligned to your time zone.

question.en: Do you sign NDAs and ensure data security?

answer.en: Yes — we sign NDAs by default and follow strict security protocols to protect client data and IP.

question.en: Why is UI/UX design important for my business?

answer.en: Good design improves user experience, increases engagement, and boosts conversions.
